The '''Mutant Acklay''' was a variety of the amphibious [[Acklay/Legends|acklay]] that had been [[Mutant|mutated]] by the toxins of [[Golbah's Pit]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]. Many lived under the waters of the [[Ebon Sea]], where they hunted creatures within the sea and surfaced to attack prey on land. Mutant acklays were hardier than standard acklays, and had heavier claws. Their shells were a glossy black.

During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] killed a mutant acklay that had escaped the [[Geonosian Bio-Lab]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], using part of its carcass as a trophy.
